open_gaps.SEC-002: LOW, unchanged. viewer.js loadDocument() still imposes no numPages>1000 cap at the load boundary; merge.js addFiles() has no cumulative-bytes/page cap. Client-side-only DoS (uploader's own tab) on the 1.6 GiB box. Developer task — fix once at the viewer load boundary to cover all per-page consumers. Race amplifier already fixed (TASK-316).

notes: 31 JS modules (+2 since last review). Reviewed both new modules: night-mode.js (view-only CSS-class toggle on #pdf-pages, filter invert+hue-rotate; localStorage try/catch-guarded; only static developer strings via textContent; no input/upload/download/eval — XSS-safe) and headers-footers.js (pdf-lib drawText onto a fresh copy of doc.getData(); user text sanitized to WinAnsi 0x20-0xFF with control chars dropped; per-zone 120-char cap; download filename whitelisted to [A-Za-z0-9._-] and length-capped; blob URL revoked; empty-all-zones guard; font size clamped 6-36; no innerHTML/eval/external request — XSS-safe). Full-JS audit: zero non-empty innerHTML assignments (all matches are comments), zero eval/Function/document.write, zero external fetch/XHR/remote script src. upload.js still enforces ext+MIME+empty+size(50MB)+%PDF- magic, filenames sanitized. Live headers verified: full resource CSP, X-Frame-Options SAMEORIGIN, Referrer-Policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff. Path blocking: .git/config + CLAUDE.md + scripts/*.sh all 403, traversal 404, site 200. No hardcoded secrets in js/, no PRIVATE KEY in git history. No failed/invalid SSH auth in last 24h. Disk 44%. Stability gate OPEN (0 real SYSTEM CRITICAL, 0 FAILED, 0 DONE-unverified).
